The VISSTA XC was designed to be a robust, light, and comfortable XC-competition harness with excellent feel in the air.

It provides an outstanding flying experience with a comfortable and extremely aerodynamically efficient seating position. This makes it suitable especially for XC pilots and competition pilots who are looking for a comfortable low drag harness.

The VISSTA XC features dual integrated reserve containers, integrated D-chute pockets, and a large foam protector.
It is lightweight, and it can be folded in half making it a compact all-round harness that can be stored in a conventional medium or large rucksack.

COMPONENTS POSITION

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_4,3_4″ use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”1″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_margin=”5px||||false|false” custom_padding=”30px||0px||false|false” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” link_font=”|800|||||||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

1. Flight-deck
2. Front storage bag 3.5 lit.
3. Dual rescue system container
4. Main back protector certification              #PH_438.2024
5. D-Chute container
6. Main storage bag with loading strap
7. Back head protector
8. Radio pocket (optional)

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”3_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_image src=”https://www.flowparagliders.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/components-position-img-1.jpg” title_text=”Screenshot” align=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||-20px||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ module_id=”colours” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”0px||80px||false|false” border_color_top=”#2B59C0″ border_color_bottom=”#2b59c0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” gutter_width=”2″ make_equal=”on” module_id=”download” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” custom_padding=”51px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Oswald|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”center” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_3_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” header_3_text_align=”left” header_3_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_3_font_size=”17px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” background_color=”#000000″ module_alignment=”center” custom_padding=”14px||5px|20px|false|false” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” global_colors_info=”{}”]

excerpt.rendered: TECHNICAL DATA MATERIALS OVERVIEW DOWNLOADS The VISSTA XC was designed to be a robust, light, and comfortable XC-competition harness with excellent feel in the air. It provides an outstanding flying experience with a comfortable and extremely aerodynamically efficient seating position. This makes it suitable especially for XC pilots and competition pilots who are looking for […]

yoast_head_json.title: Vissta XC - Flow Paragliders
yoast_head_json.description: The VISSTA XC was designed to be a robust, light, and comfortable XC-competition harness with excellent feel in the air.It provides an outstanding flying experience with a comfortable and extremely aerodynamically efficient seating position. This makes it suitable especially for XC pilots and competition pilots who are looking for a comfortable low drag harness.
